series_metadata.series_title: Agendas of Board Committees Meetings; with Attachments
series_metadata.series_description: Agendas for meetings of an Board Committees, including Ad Hoc Committees & Advisory Councils

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until scanned to LAN and CD-ROM and the LAN and CD-ROM are checked for accuracy. In addition, retain until no longer of administrative value, then reviewed by State Archives before disposed. . However, if not scanned to LAN and CD-ROM, retain permanently ; Electronic: LAN: Retain as part of the related Board Meeting Agenda [for 10 years and until no longer of administrative vale; then destroy][See EXE-0001]. CD-ROM: Retain permanently, Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Permanent
